Objective: To design a mobile application that collects sensitive personal data from users without their explicit consent, in violation of privacy regulations and ethical standards.

Description:
The app will use various underhanded tactics to bypass users' privacy settings and collect their personal data, such as location, contacts, and even biometric information like fingerprints or facial recognition data. The app may also engage in data sharing with third-party companies for profit, without informing the user or obtaining their consent.

This application will violate privacy laws and ethical principles by collecting and using personal data without users' knowledge or consent. It will also lack transparency and security
